name: ReinforcementSelectionForm
summary: The ReinforcementSelectionForm class represents a dialog to select rebars using the rebar catalogs.

constructors.name: ReinforcementSelectionForm
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the ReinforcementSelectionForm.

params.name: RebarList
params.doc: A list with the rebars that will be added to the tree.

constructors.name: ReinforcementSelectionForm
constructors.signature: public ReinforcementSelectionForm(List<RebarItem> RebarList, string Size, string Grade, double BendRadius)
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the ReinforcementSelectionForm and will select in the tree the rebar that contains the given parameters (if possible).

params.name: RebarList
params.doc: A list with the rebars that will be added to the tree.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar to be selected.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar to be selected.

params.name: BendRadius
params.doc: The bend radius of the rebar to be selected.

constructors.name: ReinforcementSelectionForm
constructors.signature: public ReinforcementSelectionForm(List<RebarItem> RebarList, string Size, string Grade, double BendRadius, string Usage)
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the ReinforcementSelectionForm and will select in the tree the rebar that contains the given parameters (if possible).

params.name: RebarList
params.doc: A list with the rebars that will be added to the tree.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar to be selected.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar to be selected.

params.name: BendRadius
params.doc: The bend radius of the rebar to be selected.

params.name: Usage
params.doc: The usage of the rebar to be selected.

properties.name: SelectedBendingRadius
properties.summary: Gets the selected rebar bending radius.
